creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for knot-1.6.4
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
3 out of 3 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/libknot/dnssec/crypto.c.rej
=> Patch patch-src_libknot_dnssec_crypto.c failed to apply cleanly.

I guess your patch is missing some patch removals.
